_description: Registry of all scanners. Pipeline runner reads this to determine which scanners are due. Updated by each scanner on successful completion (last_run_utc, last_run_signals, last_run_status).

_cadence_policy.daily: run once per UTC day — skip if last_run_utc is today
_cadence_policy.weekly: run once per UTC week — skip if last_run_utc is within last 7d

scanners.name: pre_phase3_readout_scanner
scanners.notes: Added 2026-04-20 S69. Pre-edge Phase 3 readout scanner per D-013. Queries CT.gov v2 for industry-sponsored Phase 3 trials with PrimaryCompletionDate in next 90d and OverallStatus ACTIVE_NOT_RECRUITING/COMPLETED. Scores via binary_catalyst rubric with approval_probability seeded from config/phase3_approval_base_rates.json. Triage gate: >=3 of 5 patterns + INDUSTRY sponsor. Sponsor->ticker resolution happens downstream via openfigi_resolver.
